description: TCEL Tenant-9 T9-040-Autonomous-Orchestrator package, generated from the spec folder as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata (structure faithful; universal AI-boundary/cross-tenant controls enforced, full control catalog carried as a knowledge asset for traceability). Depends on Foundation; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived; cross-package name collisions auto-omitted by the generator's claimed-names ledger.
name: TCEL T9-040-Autonomous-Orchestrator

rules.name: Cross-tenant denial
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (or workflow reference that resolves outside the current tenant,Critical,Security). Cross-tenant denial.
rules.reasonTemplate: AO-014: access denied - cross-tenant access is prohibited (or workflow reference that resolves outside the current tenant,Critical,Security).

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-040-Autonomous-Orchestrator Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: AO-014 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: AO-001 Approved orchestration policy | Preventive | Reject execution of any plan not covered by an approved orchestration policy | Critical | AI Governance. AO-002 Approved agent registry | Preventive | Reject invocation of any agent not present and active in T9-007's registry | Critical | AI Governance. AO-003 Approved workflow registry | Preventive | Reject execution of any workflow not present and active in T9-030's registry | Critical | AI Governance. AO-004 Deterministic controls | Preventive | Route every action through the target domain's own deterministic control catalog before execution; deny if any control rejects | Critical | AI Governance. AO-005 Human approval threshold | Preventive | Block any action above the configured materiality threshold until a named human approver signs off | Critical | Board/CEO. AO-006 Permission boundary | Preventive | Deny any action outside the orchestrator's signed permission scope for the current plan | Critical | AI Governance. AO-007 No self-modification | Preventive | Deny any attempt by the orchestrator to alter its own governance rules | permissions | or control configuration,Critical,Model Risk Committee. AO-008 No self-expansion | Preventive | Deny any attempt to acquire tools | agents | or scope beyond what the current signed plan authorizes,Critical,Model Risk Committee. AO-009 Kill switch | Preventive | Immediately halt all in-flight and queued orchestrator actions on activation; no override permitted except by Board-authorized restart | Critical | SafetyGovernor.AI/Board. AO-010 Action simulation | Preventive | Require a dry-run simulation showing predicted state change before any material action executes | Critical | AI Governance. AO-011 Evidence capture | Evidence | Record trigger | plan | inputs, simulation result, approvals, and outcome for every action to T9-029,Critical,AI Governance. AO-012 Rollback | Corrective | Automatically execute the pre-registered rollback procedure for any action that fails post-execution validation | Critical | AI Governance. AO-013 Idempotency | Preventive | Reject re-execution of an action whose idempotency key has already been processed | Critical | Platform. AO-014 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny any action | agent | or workflow reference that resolves outside the current tenant,Critical,Security. AO-015 Sensitive action restriction | Preventive | Block execution of any action tagged sensitive (financial transfer | policy change | personnel action) without a second named human approver,Critical,AI Governance. AO-016 Model status check | Preventive | Deny invocation of any agent whose underlying model is not in Validated status per T9-027 | High | Model Risk Committee. AO-017 Rule status check | Preventive | Deny execution against any rule not in Active/Approved status per T9-035 | High | AI Governance. AO-018 Workflow status check | Preventive | Deny execution of any workflow version not currently marked Approved in T9-030 | High | AI Governance. AO-019 Identity validation | Preventive | Verify the invoking identity (human or service) against T9-032 before granting any orchestrator session | High | Security. AO-020 Rate limit | Preventive | Throttle and queue actions exceeding the configured per-agent or per-workflow rate ceiling | High | Platform. AO-021 Outcome monitoring | Detective | Compare actual post-action state against the simulated prediction and flag material deviation | High | AI Governance. AO-022 Incident escalation | Corrective | Escalate to SafetyGovernor.AI and the on-call incident owner within the defined SLA for any failed or deviating action | High | AI Governance. AO-023 Recovery | Corrective | Reconcile state and confirm rollback completion before resuming any paused orchestration stream | High | AI Governance. AO-024 Audit trail | Evidence | Retain an immutable | independently queryable log of every orchestrator decision and action for the retention period defined in T9-029 | High,Internal Audit. AO-025 Board oversight | Corrective | Escalate any Critical-severity control failure or kill-switch activation to the Board within the defined notification window | High | Board.
